codeReview.summary: The fix commit fully addresses the prior failure: both header-only `ResultsStep` SectionCard callsites no longer pass placeholder `<div />` children, `SectionCard` now allows omitted children, and test coverage now explicitly verifies omitted-children spacer suppression in addition to the null-children case.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill mandates explicit red→green TDD with a failing targeted test before implementation, but this session's transcript skeleton shows code edits before the first targeted test run while handoff feedback still reports full procedure adherence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session `bd228c1b-d401-4f9e-a03d-04678b7c4dd4` shows `ApplyPatch` calls before `cd frontend && npm test -- --run src/components/ui/SectionCard.test.tsx`; handoff `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` is `true`.

summary: Pass: this fix resolves the original spacer regression by removing placeholder children from the actual header-only ResultsStep cards and validating omitted-children behavior directly in SectionCard tests.
